title: Ovella
overview: Ove is a young man who has been treated and raised like a sheep all his life. His daily life consists of eating, sleeping, grazing and hanging out with LL, the only sheep in the herd that seems to accept him.

trailers.title: Tráiler OVELLA - Largometraje colectivo I 2021
trailers.channel_name: ESCAC Escola Superior de Cinema i Audiovisuals de Catalunya
